case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS CRAWFORD, GARY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,002.87 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, GARY $1,970.87 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,002.87, JUDGMENT WAS RENDERED ON MARCH 15, 1989. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORIGINAL JUDGMENT WAS RENDERED ON MARCH 15, 1989. JUDGMENT OF MARCH 1, 1994 WAS ONLY A MAKE UP DATE FOR COMPUTER PURPOSES.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,251.66 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, GARY
